action.reasoning: Observation: iter 8 eval gave test BA 0.506 with DINOv2+DANN, below best 0.602 (CLIP+DANN). Bird improved to 0.63 but many other classes dropped. Analysis: CLIP features transfer better for most classes; DINOv2 overfits source domains. Need to close domain gap with stronger regularization and domain alignment. Decision: revert to CLIP ViT-B/16 backbone (proven), add CORAL loss (covariance alignment between domain features), stronger augmentation (RandAugment mag=12, higher mixup), label smoothing, and train 30 epochs. Time budget allows 2-3 training runs.
